title: Arconic stock soars after WSJ report of buyout talks with Apollo Global Management
text: Shares of Arconic Corp. ARNC rocketed 21.6% toward a 5 1/2-month high in afternoon trading Tuesday, after The Wall Street Journal reported that private-equity firm Apollo Global Management Inc. is in talks to buy the aerospace parts company. Apollo's stock APO gained 0.8%.

title: How To Supercharge Your Portfolio With Apollo And Other Alt Managers
text: High-growing and sizable alt management industry is not represented in the S&P 500 index today. Adding individual alt managers to diversified portfolios should benefit investors. APO's biggest differentiator is full ownership of Athene, a retirement specialist. Population aging represents a powerful tailwind for Athene.

title: 3 Stocks to Buy That Make Money From a Growing Annuities Market
text: When researching some stocks to buy this week, I came across an interesting piece from earlier in February about annuity demand. According to Axios, annuity sales climbed 22% higher in 2022 to about $310 billion.

title: Apollo Names Whitney Chatterjee General Counsel
text: Chatterjee to Assume Role of Chief Legal Officer in 2024 Chatterjee to Assume Role of Chief Legal Officer in 2024

title: Apollo Appoints Former U.S. Senator Patrick Toomey to Board of Directors
text: NEW YORK, Feb. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, “Apollo”) today announced former U.S. Senator Patrick Toomey has been appointed to its Board of Directors, effective March 15, 2023. With this appointment, the Apollo Board of Directors will increase to 17 directors, 13 of whom are independent.

title: Yahoo joins the great tech cull as 1,000 roles go with a further 600 on the line
text: Yahoo, owned by Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO), announced plans to restructure its advertising technology division which will see 1,000 jobs cut, and a further 600 could go in the latest of a wave of tech sector layoffs. According to an interview given by CEO Jim Lanzone, the company intends to reduce headcount at its Yahoo for Business advertising technology unit by 50% by the end of 2023, which equates to more than 20% of the total Yahoo workforce.

title: 2023 Layoffs: Yahoo Slashes 1,600 Jobs While GitHub Cuts 300
text: Major U.S. companies laid off more than 81,000 employees in January.

title: Yahoo Laying Off 20% Of Workforce In Ad Tech Pullback
text: Yahoo is significantly scaling back its investments in advertising technology and will lay off about 1,600 employees, or 20% of its workforce, as part of the shift in strategy.

title: Yahoo to cut more than 20% of staff in strategic shift
text: Yahoo intends to lay off more than 20% of its staff as it changes the way it approaches its work in advertising technology.

title: Apollo Global Management, Inc. (APO) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Start Time: 08:30 January 1, 0000 9:46 AM ET Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE:APO ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 09, 2023, 08:30 AM ET Company Participants Marc Rowan - CEO Jim Zelter - Co-President Martin Kelly - CFO Noah Gunn - Global Head, IR Conference Call Participants Glenn Schorr - Evercore ISI Alexander Blostein - Goldman Sachs Patrick Davitt - Autonomous Research Craig Siegenthaler - Bank of America Michael Cyprys - Morgan Stanley Finian O'Shea - Wells Fargo Benjamin Budish - Barclays Gerald O'Hara - Jefferies Adam Beatty - UBS Operator Good morning and welcome to Apollo Global Management's Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Earnings Conference Call. During today's discussion, all callers will be placed in listen-only mode.

title: Yahoo to lay off 20% of staff by year end, beginning this week
text: Yahoo will lay off more than 20% of staff, or around 1,600 individuals, with the company's Yahoo for Business being slashed in half, the company said.

title: Yahoo will lay off 20% of staff, or 1600 people
text: Yahoo is laying off 20% of its staff, impacting 1,600 employees in its ad tech business. Yahoo is the parent company to TechCrunch.

title: Apollo Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: NEW YORK, Feb. 09, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, “Apollo”) today reported results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2022.

text: ATLAS SP Partners Launches as Standalone Securitized Credit Origination Platform to Accelerate Growth in Multi-trillion-dollar Asset Backed Finance Market ATLAS SP Partners Launches as Standalone Securitized Credit Origination Platform to Accelerate Growth in Multi-trillion-dollar Asset Backed Finance Market

title: Apollo Opportunity Foundation Commits Nearly $3M in Employee-Directed Grants to 11 Nonprofits Working to Advance Economic Prosperity
text: The Apollo Opportunity Foundation will form long-term partnerships with grantee organizations working to expand opportunity through educational and professional development, skill building and more The Apollo Opportunity Foundation will form long-term partnerships with grantee organizations working to expand opportunity through educational and professional development, skill building and more

title: Apollo Global in talks to buy stake in Credit Suisse unit -WSJ
text: Apollo Global Management Inc is among a group of financial firms in talks to buy a stake in Credit Suisse Group's revamped investment bank, the Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.

title: Apollo to Present at the Bank of America Financial Services Conference
text: NEW YORK, Feb. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo (NYSE: APO) today announced that Jim Zelter, Co-President of Apollo Asset Management (NYSE: AAM-PA, AAM-PB), will participate in an analyst-led fireside chat at the Bank of America Financial Services Conference on Wednesday, February 15, 2023 at 12:50 pm ET.

title: Apollo to Present at the Credit Suisse 24th Annual Financial Services Forum
text: NEW YORK, Feb. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo (NYSE: APO) today announced that Martin Kelly, Chief Financial Officer, will participate in an analyst-led fireside chat at the Credit Suisse 24th Annual Financial Services Forum on Monday, February 13, 2023 at 4:20 pm ET.
